resources.string: Paisa seedha aapke account mein aata hai.\nHum sirf payment messages padhte hain.\nKoi bank login nahi chahiye.
Roz ka hisaab, bina kuch likhe
Payment aayega → SMS aayega → Hum gin lenge.\nBas SMS permission do, baaki hum sambhaal lenge.
Hum sirf bank aur UPI messages padhte hain.\nPersonal messages nahi.\nAapka data phone mein hi rehta hai — kuch bhi bahar nahi jaata.
SMS permission ke bina hum aapki income track nahi kar sakte.\nKoi personal message nahi padhte — sirf bank aur UPI alerts.
Aapne permission permanently deny kar diya.\nSettings mein jaake SMS permission on karein.
Hum sirf bank aur UPI messages padhte hain.\nPersonal messages nahi.\nAapka data phone mein hi rehta hai.
SMS permission ke bina app kaam nahi kar payega
Jaise hi UPI/bank payment aayega, yahan dikhega
